message:
🐛 Fix Auto-QA issue deduplication to prevent duplicate filings (#113)

The existing dedupe logic used exact title matching, which fails when
titles contain dynamic counts (e.g., "5 swallowed errors" vs "3 swallowed
errors" are treated as different issues). This caused dozens of duplicate
issues to pile up.

Ports the improved deduplication from kubestellar/console:
- Pattern-based fuzzy matching: normalizes numbers and counts in titles
- 7-day closed-issue lookback: prevents re-filing issues that were just fixed
- Parallel API calls for open + closed issue fetching

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
